SEARCH
Module project
Package project.model

Class Session

java.lang.Object
project.model.Session
public class Session extends Object
Custom data model class for a Pomodoro Session. Represents each Pomodoro session that the User initiates. . Data is stored in session.db for persistence. TableviewFXML represents Session Data as an editable GUI SessionDAO allows users to perform CRUD operations on Session Data
Author:
Minhman Do

    • Session

      public Session(Timestamp timestamp, String sessionType, String sessionTask, String timespent, boolean completion, int user_id)
      Session Public Constructor without id field. For inserting new Sessions after the first, as id will auto increment in SQLite.
